Our Team

Meet Our Experts

Our team of qualified accountants brings decades of combined experience across UAE and international markets. We are committed to delivering exceptional service and strategic insights.

HA

Hassan Al-Rashid

Managing Director

ACCAICAEWCPA

Hassan leads ARMH & Co UAE with over 18 years of experience in Middle East taxation and business advisory. He specializes in UAE corporate tax, VAT, and free zone regulations.

18+ years experience
American University of Sharjah - Finance
FH

Fatima Hassan

Senior Tax Manager

ACCACTAVAT Certified

Fatima is our VAT and compliance specialist with extensive experience helping UAE businesses navigate complex regulatory requirements. She has advised clients across all major Emirates.

14 years experience
University of Dubai - Accounting
OK

Omar Khalifa

Head of Accounting

ACCACMAIFRS Expert

Omar leads our accounting team with expertise in IFRS implementation and financial reporting. He ensures our clients maintain compliant financial records across jurisdictions.

12 years experience
Abu Dhabi University - Accounting
AA

Aisha Al-Mansouri

VAT Specialist

ACCAMTD Certified

Aisha specializes in VAT compliance and audit support. She has helped numerous businesses achieve 100% VAT compliance and avoid costly penalties.

10 years experience
University of Sharjah - Finance
MA

Mohammed Ali

Payroll & WPS Manager

CIPPHR Certified

Mohammed manages our payroll services with expertise in WPS compliance and UAE labor regulations. He ensures seamless payroll operations for businesses of all sizes.

9 years experience
University of Al Ain - Business
LA

Layla Abdullah

Client Services Manager

ACCAMBA

Layla ensures our UAE clients receive exceptional service and support. She acts as the primary point of contact and coordinates service delivery across Emirates.

8 years experience
University of Dubai - Business Administration
